description:
Goal: finish the prequel epic with docs and tests that make fz-rh2.8.2 a mechanical adapter-consumption problem. Signal: the documented contract matches the implemented MaterializedProgram -> AbiReadyProgram -> EmissionReadyProgram path, and fz-rh2.8.2 no longer needs to decide the data model.

Change:
- Update northstar.html, .agent/docs/pipeline.md, and .agent/docs/telemetry.md with the final artifact/ABI/emission facts and raw telemetry expectations.
- Add or update contract tests proving backend-facing work fails if it asks semantic/type/reachability questions after MaterializedProgram.
- Update fz-rh2.8.2 ticket text, if necessary, to consume EmissionReadyProgram rather than invent AbiReady/Emitted facts.
- Remove any temporary fixture/helper introduced during this epic that is not meant to remain.

Why:
- The next ticket should wire consumers to settled facts. It should not reopen architectural questions already answered here.

Checks:
- Quicksort, Enum.reduce, and variadic extern artifact tests cover the final contract.
- Docs and tests agree on names, fact order, and telemetry surface.
- `bw show fz-rh2.8.2` describes adapter integration against EmissionReadyProgram.
title: Compiler2 artifacts: close docs and adapter handoff contract
